title: Tests, Examples, Fuzzing, Benchmarks, Coverage, and Static Analysis · Go Build Room
summary: A parser passes familiar examples but fails malformed UTF-8, aliases caller memory, and regresses under a dependency update. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a layered parser quality dossier while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Write table-driven tests and subtests whose names, fixtures, assertions, and changed cases expose the failed contract.
Choose unit, integration, end-to-end, golden, example, and contract tests with narrow fakes at owned boundaries.
Define fuzz properties, seed corpora, bounds, failure minimization, and retained regression inputs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

workshop case — A parser passes 3 table cases but fails malformed UTF-8 and aliases input. Add a changed subtest, a double-transform fuzz property, a controlled benchmark, and separate coverage, vet, race, and Go 1.26 modernizer claims.
